name: apac-compliance-mcp
title: APAC Compliance MCP — AI Agent Outbound for Asia-Pacific
description: MCP server for AI agents selling into APAC. 7 tools: country-specific buyer psychology (Japan/Singapore/Korea/India/Australia/HongKong/Taiwan/Indonesia), formal etiquette protocols, channel-specific outreach templates, follow-up cadences, multi-stakeholder navigation, gift-and-relationship norms. By Elisabeth Hitz.
seoTitle: APAC Compliance MCP for AI Agents | Asia-Pacific Outbound
seoDescription: MCP server for AI SDRs selling into Asia-Pacific. Japan, Singapore, Korea, India, Australia, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Indonesia. Country-specific etiquette + outreach.
